## Description

A clear description of the bug.

## Reproduction

Steps (or a minimal request / config) that trigger the problem.

## Expected behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual behavior

What actually happened (include error output / logs if any).

## Environment

- MorScan version (`package.json`):
- Node version (`node --version`):
